The '''''Northstar''''' was a [[Hajen-class fleet tender|''Hajen''-class fleet tender]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==History==
During the transit to the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], the ''Northstar'' became lost along the way and had to reunite with the rest of the [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] at a later point in time.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
